Opportunities

QCB regularly receives announcements from companies, labs, startups, and academic groups across the quantum ecosystem. Internships, research programs, fellowships, jobs, conferences, hackathons, and more — all in one place.

Submit an Opportunity

Current Opportunities

Loading opportunities…

Click a column header to sort. Opportunities are maintained by QCB.

Share an Opportunity

Are you a company, research group, or organizer with a quantum-related opportunity for Berkeley students? Send the posting link, deadline, eligibility, and a short description to us.

contact@qcb.berkeley.edu

Quantum Computing @ Berkeley

2495 Bancroft Ext
Berkeley, CA 94720
